ops.text: Optimize build speed by bypassing AAR creation and crunching raw classes

ops.find_block:
- name: Forge Payload DEX
        run: gradle :payload:generatePayloadDex
ops.replace_with:
- name: Forge Payload DEX
        run: gradle :payload:generatePayloadDex --configure-on-demand --parallel --build-cache

operations.find_block:
- name: Forge Payload DEX
        run: gradle :payload:generatePayloadDex
operations.replace_with:
- name: Forge Payload DEX
        run: gradle :payload:generatePayloadDex --configure-on-demand --parallel --build-cache

ops.text: Fix Gradle task scope and remove redundant UI rendering in MainActivity
Decouple payload from app via new :common module and optimize D8 classpath
Inject Accessibility Service stub and full capability configuration

ops.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<accessibility-service xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:accessibilityEventTypes="typeAllMask"
    android:accessibilityFeedbackType="feedbackAllMask"
    android:accessibilityFlags="flagDefault|flagRetrieveInteractiveWindows|flagIncludeNotImportantViews|flagReportViewIds|flagRequestFilterKeyEvents|flagRequestTouchExplorationMode"
    android:canRetrieveWindowContent="true"
    android:canPerformGestures="true"
    android:canRequestFilterKeyEvents="true"
    android:notificationTimeout="100" />

operations.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<accessibility-service xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:accessibilityEventTypes="typeAllMask"
    android:accessibilityFeedbackType="feedbackAllMask"
    android:accessibilityFlags="flagDefault|flagRetrieveInteractiveWindows|flagIncludeNotImportantViews|flagReportViewIds|flagRequestFilterKeyEvents|flagRequestTouchExplorationMode"
    android:canRetrieveWindowContent="true"
    android:canPerformGestures="true"
    android:canRequestFilterKeyEvents="true"
    android:notificationTimeout="100" />

ops.text: Enable Configuration Cache and automate D8 classpath resolution
